name: Inflection-2
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (architecture undisclosed; trained at ~10^25 FLOPs)
note: Trained on 5,000 H100 GPUs at ~10^25 FLOPs; billed at launch as the second-most-capable LLM in the world, beating PaLM 2 Large.

results.notes: Independent comparison table; Inflection-2 ranked 2nd behind GPT-4 (86.4), just above Claude-2 CoT (78.5). Literally confirmed on page. [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]
10-shot HellaSwag. Literally confirmed: page text states 'Inflection-2 reaches 89.0 on HellaSwag 10-shot compared to GPT-4's 95.3.'

Confirmed via direct raw-HTML fetch (not summarized) of the SEJ article: literal text 'MBPP Scores: LLaMA-2 70B: 45.0 | PaLM-2S: 50.0 | Inflection-2: 53.0' appears verbatim in the page body, relaying Inflection AI's own published chart (the inflection.ai/inflection-2 blog page shows the same data only as an unreadable chart image, so this press relay is the only text-form citation found). Labeled self-reported per the corpus's existing convention for this same source/page (aggregator relay of a vendor-published figure, not an independent re-measurement).

Confirmed via direct raw-HTML fetch of the SEJ article: literal text 'These are the scores: LLaMA-2 70B: 29.9 | PaLM-2S: 37.6 | Inflection-2: 44.5 | GPT-4: 67.0' appears verbatim in the page body under the HumanEval section, relaying Inflection AI's own published chart. Labeled self-reported per the corpus's existing convention for this source.

verificationNotes: Confirmed model is real; training-completion/announcement dated Nov 22-28 2023 across sources (Forbes article dated Nov 22, 2023), consistent with record. DROPPED three result rows that could not be confirmed as literal text on the cited inflection.ai/inflection-2 page: self-reported MMLU 86.8, GSM8K 89.3, and TriviaQA 86.3. Direct full-text fetch of that page (twice) found these benchmark tables are presented only as chart IMAGES — the numeric strings '86.8', '89.3', and '86.3' do not appear anywhere in the page's actual text/markdown, and no alternate source could locate a text-form citation of these exact figures. Kept HellaSwag 89 (literally stated as '89.0' in body text) and independent MMLU 79.6 (literally confirmed on searchenginejournal.com's comparison table).
